tasks.title: unwrap()/expect() Elimination - Root Task
tasks.description: Eliminate all unwrap()/expect() calls across the codebase and replace with proper error handling using thiserror enums. This is a prerequisite for repository pattern and other P1 tasks. Target: zero unwrap/expect in production code.
test_criteria: RunRegressionTest: grep -rn 'unwrap()|expect(' crates/*/src/*.rs | grep -v '#\[cfg(test)]' returns 0 occurrences
RunTestSuite: cargo test passes with no test failures
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify all error paths are properly handled with Result/Option matching
tasks.impl_notes: Create error enums using thiserror. Categorize unwrap calls: ParseError, OptionUnwrap, LockError, IOError, InvalidState. Work file by file starting with highest count.

tasks.title: Audit unwrap()/expect() in crates/core/src/skill.rs (135 occurrences)
tasks.description: Audit all unwrap()/expect() in skill.rs. Categorize by error type. Create SkillError enum with thiserror. Replace all 135 occurrences with proper error handling.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SkillError enum covers all unwrap categories (ParseError, OptionUnwrap, LockError, IOError, InvalidState)
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-core --lib passes
RunRegressionTest: grep -c 'unwrap\|expect' crates/core/src/skill.rs returns 0
tasks.impl_notes: Create error enum in crates/core/src/error.rs. Pattern: #[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)] pub enum SkillError { #[error(...)] ... }. Replace each unwrap with ? operator or match.

tasks.title: Audit unwrap()/expect() in crates/core/src/session.rs (86 occurrences)
tasks.description: Audit all unwrap()/expect() in session.rs. Create SessionError enum with thiserror. Replace all 86 occurrences with proper error handling.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SessionError enum covers all unwrap categories
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-core --lib passes
RunRegressionTest: grep -c 'unwrap\|expect' crates/core/src/session.rs returns 0
tasks.impl_notes: Use existing error crate patterns. Focus on LockError for tokio sync primitives, IOError for file operations, ParseError for deserialization.

tasks.title: Audit unwrap()/expect() in crates/core/src/project.rs (79 occurrences)
tasks.description: Audit all unwrap()/expect() in project.rs. Create ProjectError enum with thiserror. Replace all 79 occurrences with proper error handling.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify ProjectError enum covers all unwrap categories
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-core --lib passes
RunRegressionTest: grep -c 'unwrap\|expect' crates/core/src/project.rs returns 0
tasks.impl_notes: Project error handling typically involves configuration parsing, path operations, and state management.

tasks.title: Audit remaining unwrap()/expect() in crates/core/ (336 occurrences across 33 files)
tasks.description: Audit remaining unwrap()/expect() in core crate. Prioritize files with >20 occurrences. Create appropriate error types as needed.
test_criteria: RunRegressionTest: total unwrap/expect count in crates/core/ drops to 0
AddUnitTest: verify each new error type has corresponding test coverage
tasks.impl_notes: Files with >20 occurrences should get dedicated error types. Others can use existing error types or anyhow::Error.

tasks.title: Audit unwrap()/expect() in crates/tools/src/lsp_tool.rs (74 occurrences)
tasks.description: Audit all unwrap()/expect() in lsp_tool.rs. Create ToolError enum with thiserror. Replace all 74 occurrences with proper error handling.

test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: grep -rn 'unwrap()|expect(' crates/*/src/*.rs | grep -v '#\[cfg(test)]' returns 0 lines
RunTestSuite: cargo test --all passes
AddRegressionTest: cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings passes
tasks.impl_notes: This is the gate task - must return 0 unwrap/expect before proceeding to P1 tasks.

tasks.title: Repository Pattern Implementation - Root Task
tasks.description: Implement repository pattern with traits for Session and Project entities. Provides abstraction over storage backends and enables dependency injection for testability.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: grep -r 'pub trait.*Repository' crates/storage/src/ returns SessionRepository and ProjectRepository traits
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-storage passes
tasks.impl_notes: Depends on P0-001 completion for error types. Can begin design work earlier but implementation blocked by P0.

tasks.title: Define SessionRepository trait in crates/storage/src/repository.rs
tasks.description: Define async trait SessionRepository with methods: find_by_id, find_all, save, delete, list_by_project. Use #[async_trait] macro.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify trait has all 5 methods defined
AddIntegrationTest: verify trait can be implemented by multiple backends
tasks.impl_notes: Trait signature: #[async_trait] pub trait SessionRepository: Send + Sync { async fn find_by_id(&self, id: &str) -> Result<Option<Session>, StorageError>; ... }

tasks.title: Define ProjectRepository trait in crates/storage/src/repository.rs
tasks.description: Define async trait ProjectRepository with methods: find_by_id, find_all, save, delete. Use #[async_trait] macro.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify trait has all 4 methods defined
AddIntegrationTest: verify trait can be implemented by multiple backends
tasks.impl_notes: Similar pattern to SessionRepository but for Project entity.

tasks.title: Define StorageError enum in crates/storage/src/error.rs
tasks.description: Define StorageError enum with thiserror: Database(sqlx::Error), NotFound(String), Serialization(String).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify StorageError can be converted from sqlx::Error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify all error variants implement std::error::Error
tasks.impl_notes: Pattern: #[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)] pub enum StorageError { #[error("database error: {0}")] Database(#[from] sqlx::Error), #[error("not found: {0}")] NotFound(String), #[error("serialization error: {0}")] Serialization(String) }

tasks.title: Implement SqliteSessionRepository in crates/storage/src/sqlite_repository.rs
tasks.description: Implement SessionRepository for SQLite backend. Use sqlx for async database operations.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all 5 methods work correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify session CRUD operations with real SQLite database
tasks.impl_notes: SqliteSessionRepository should wrap sqlx::SqlitePool and implement trait methods using SQL queries.

tasks.title: Implement SqliteProjectRepository in crates/storage/src/sqlite_repository.rs
tasks.description: Implement ProjectRepository for SQLite backend. Use sqlx for async database operations.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all 4 methods work correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify project CRUD operations with real SQLite database
tasks.impl_notes: Similar pattern to SqliteSessionRepository but for Project entity.

tasks.title: Implement InMemorySessionRepository for tests
tasks.description: Implement SessionRepository using in-memory HashMap for testing. Located in crates/storage/src/memory_repository.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify in-memory implementation matches trait contract
AddRegressionTest: existing storage tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: InMemory implementations are for test isolation - should not persist data between test runs.

tasks.title: Implement InMemoryProjectRepository for tests
tasks.description: Implement ProjectRepository using in-memory HashMap for testing. Located in crates/storage/src/memory_repository.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify in-memory implementation matches trait contract
AddRegressionTest: existing storage tests still pass
tasks.impl_notes: Follow same pattern as InMemorySessionRepository.

tasks.title: Refactor StorageService to use repository traits via dependency injection
tasks.description: Refactor StorageService to accept SessionRepository and ProjectRepository traits via constructor injection. Enables swapping implementations.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify StorageService works with both SQLite and InMemory implementations
RunRegressionTest: existing tests pass with new architecture
tasks.impl_notes: StorageService should hold Arc<dyn SessionRepository> and Arc<dyn ProjectRepository> instead of concrete types.

tasks.title: Verify repository traits are properly defined
tasks.description: Final verification that repository pattern is correctly implemented.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: grep -r 'pub trait.*Repository' crates/storage/src/ returns expected traits
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-storage passes
AddIntegrationTest: full storage integration test passes
tasks.impl_notes: Gate task for P1-001 completion.

tasks.title: Visibility Audit and Control - Root Task

test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify internal refactoring does not break public API
RunTestSuite: cargo test --all passes
tasks.impl_notes: Independent of P0 - can run in parallel. Use cargo doc --document-private-items to identify leaked internals.

RunRegressionTest: dependent crates still compile
tasks.impl_notes: Keep only truly public API. Move internal re-exports to pub(crate) or remove.

tasks.title: Use impl Into<String> for constructors that need ownership

tasks.title: Newtype Wrappers for Type Safety - Root Task

test_criteria: AddUnitTest: SessionId can be created from String and &str
AddErrorHandlingTest: SessionId provides type-safe separation from raw String
tasks.impl_notes: Pattern: #[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)] pub struct SessionId(String); impl SessionId { pub fn new(s: impl Into<String>) -> Self { Self(s.into()) } pub fn as_str(&self) -> &str { &self.0 } }

tasks.impl_notes: Each SAFETY comment must explain: (1) what invariants are guaranteed, (2) why this is safe, (3) any requirements on callers.

tasks.impl_notes: Look for structs with many Option fields or constructor with many parameters.

tasks.title: Implement ServerConfigBuilder if not exists
tasks.description: Implement ServerConfigBuilder for server configuration if not already present.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: ServerConfigBuilder builds correctly
AddRegressionTest: existing ServerConfig construction still works
tasks.impl_notes: Pattern: pub struct ServerConfigBuilder { host: Option<String>, port: Option<u16>, ... } impl ServerConfigBuilder { pub fn new() -> Self { Self { ... } } pub fn host(mut self, h: impl Into<String>) -> Self { self.host = Some(h.into()); self } ... pub fn build(self) -> Result<ServerConfig, ConfigError> { ... } }

tasks.title: Implement ClientConfigBuilder if not exists
tasks.description: Implement ClientConfigBuilder for client configuration if not already present.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: ClientConfigBuilder builds correctly
AddRegressionTest: existing ClientConfig construction still works
tasks.impl_notes: Similar pattern to ServerConfigBuilder.

tasks.title: Verify builders follow required pattern
tasks.description: Verify all builders have: new(), builder methods returning Self, build() returning Result.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: all builders have proper structure
RunTestSuite: cargo test --all passes

tasks.title: Seal Tool trait if found public

tasks.impl_notes: Pattern: mod private { pub trait Sealed {} } pub trait Tool: private::Sealed { ... }
